comments_author_or_share_link_chk.name: comments_author_or_share_link_chk
comments_author_or_share_link_chk.value: NOT ("comments"."author_id" IS NOT NULL AND "comments"."share_link_id" IS NOT NULL)

activity_events_actor_or_share_link_chk.name: activity_events_actor_or_share_link_chk
activity_events_actor_or_share_link_chk.value: NOT ("activity_events"."actor_id" IS NOT NULL AND "activity_events"."share_link_id" IS NOT NULL)

notification_preferences_quiet_hours_con.name: notification_preferences_quiet_hours_consistency
notification_preferences_quiet_hours_con.value:
("notification_preferences"."quiet_from" IS NULL AND "notification_preferences"."quiet_to" IS NULL AND "notification_preferences"."quiet_timezone" IS NULL)
          OR ("notification_preferences"."quiet_from" IS NOT NULL AND "notification_preferences"."quiet_to" IS NOT NULL AND "notification_preferences"."quiet_timezone" IS NOT NULL)
